violations.text: The pizza prep unit observed holding an ambient temperature of 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit has been serviced and is pending new parts. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

Sausage, steak and other food items were observed held at 46-47 degrees Fahrenheit in a prep unit maintaining an ambient temperature of 44-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items placed in the units under 4 hours prior to visit were moved to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Items that were held in the units were voluntarily disposed of by PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Containers of chicken soup packaged in the food establishment are lacking the list of ingredients on the labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The pizza prep unit was observed holding an ambient temperature of 44 degrees Fahrenheit. 2) The sandwich prep unit was observed holding an ambient temperature of 50 degrees Fahrenheit. - Units taken out of service until they can be serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the warewashing area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
